**Command and control multiple uncrewed systems from a single, small, expeditionary workstation.**
###### Small footprint
Operate from a laptop with short, medium, and long-range options including vehicle- and tripod-mounted antennas.
###### Open Systems Design
Open architecture and fully supported Software Development Kit (SDK). Controls all Insitu platforms as well as non-Insitu UxS.

items.notes: cGCS hardware GCS plus software suite: INEXA Control, TacitView, Catalina, MMS, Tungsten SDK

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Designs, develops, produces, and operates complete UAS platforms. Wholly owned subsidiary of The Boeing Company.

evidence.snippet:
ScanEagle
The UAS that invented the agile ISR category
============================================
**Offering VTOL, SATCOM, and advancing resilience capabilities**
With over 1.6 million combat flight hours, ScanEagle is the industry’s most trusted long-endurance UAS. Electronic resilience features, SATCOM, VTOL, AI-enabled payloads, and the same best-in class endurance make today’s updated ScanEagle ready for the battlespace of tomorrow.

Integrator
One aircraft, infinite possibilities
====================================
The Integrator is the most versatile UAS in its class, with a modular design to fit every mission. Endless configuration options include no-sacrifice VTOL and extended-range SATCOM capabilities.

RQ-21A
Program of Record for the U.S. Navy and U.S. Marine Corps
=========================================================
Expeditionary, payload flexible and the most versatile UAS in its class.

Alticam 14
----------
Multi-Imager, Multi-Feed turret with MWIR, SWIR and EO

Alticam 06
----------
Advanced Laser Targeting Support for ScanEagle UAS

EO960
-----
Multi-Imager, Multi-Feed turret with EO telescope and zoom
*   [EOIR-5](https://www.insitu.com/products/eoir5)/[Alticam 14](https://www.insitu.com/products/alticam14) Laser designator/pointer/rangefinder

Dual Imager
-----------
Increasing expeditionary capabilities with more payload options

NSP-3
-----
Multi-INT, all-weather ISR capabilities normally found on larger platforms

NSP-5
-----
Multi-INT, all-weather ISR capabilities normally found on larger platforms
*   [WAMI](https://www.insitu.com/products/redkite_wami) Wide-area motion imagery for day (Redkite) and night (Blackkite)

PT-6
----
Search, interrogate, and prosecute from one long endurance platform via state-of-the-art, automated wide-area search with high-powered zoom optics, across multiple spectral bands.

The Warden HSOR
---------------
Autonomous, real-time, wide-area, optical & hyperspectral search sensor optimized for Integrator UAS

Common Ground Control Station
cGCS
Common Ground Control Station
Small Tactical Ground Control Station
=====================================

Tungsten
Tungsten
Software Development Kit
========================
Building blocks for powerful still and motion imagery media applications

With more than **1.6 million operational flight hours** over land, at sea, and around the globe, covering more than 30 international customers, Insitu is a trusted partner for uncrewed aerial systems worldwide.
Insitu is a pioneer in the design, development, production, and operation of high-performance, cost-effective uncrewed aircraft systems.

readiness.notes: Serial production of multiple UAS platforms with 1.6M+ combat flight hours; RQ-21A is U.S. Navy/Marine Corps program of record; 30+ international customers.

tagline: Manufacturer of runway-independent fixed-wing tactical UAS (ScanEagle, Integrator, RQ-21A Blackjack for USN/USMC) and integrated ISR payloads (SAR, EO/MWIR, hyperspectral, WAMI) with ground control and autonomy software. 1.6M+ operational flight hours across 30+ international customers. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; public evidence does not confirm current federal procurement compliance posture.
